testcase.name: test_02_get_initial_project_finance
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_purchase_double_posting_fix.py:68: in test_02_get_initial_project_finance assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get project finance: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get project finance: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_03_create_credit_purchase_invoice
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_purchase_double_posting_fix.py:113: in test_03_create_credit_purchase_invoice assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Failed to create credit purchase: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create credit purchase: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","vendor_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"project_id":"proj_4aaba062","vendor_id":"vendor_aa89579c","invoice_no":"TEST-INV-dc14a67c","invoice_date":"2026-02-10","execution_date":"2026-02-10","purchase_type":"credit","items":[{"description":"Test Credit Purchase Item dc14a67c","category":"Materials","quantity":1,"unit":"nos","unit_price":15000,"line_total":15000}],"subtotal":15000,"gst_rate":0,"gst_amount":0,"grand_total":15000,"remarks":"Test credit purchase for double-posting fix verification dc14a67c"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","items",0,"material_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"description":"Test Credit Purchase Item dc14a67c","category":"Materials","quantity":1,"unit":"nos","unit_price":15000,"line_total":15000},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","items",0,"rate"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"description":"Test Credit Purchase Item dc14a67c","category":"Materials","quantity":1,"unit":"nos","unit_price":15000,"line_total":15000},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_purchase_double_posting_fix.py:132: in test_04_verify_actual_cost_unchanged_after_credit_purchase assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get project finance: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get project finance: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_07_settle_liability_payment
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_purchase_double_posting_fix.py:187: in test_07_settle_liability_payment "amount": self.test_amount, ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'TestCreditPurchaseDoublePostingFix' object has no attribute 'test_amount'
